query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `userSettings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `companyName` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `companyLogoUrl` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `namecheapApiKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `namecheapUsername` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `godaddyApiKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `godaddyApiSecret` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `porkbunApiKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `porkbunSecretKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `hostingerApiKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `onboardingCompleted` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `priceAlertsEnabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `notificationsEnabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `namecheapAffiliateId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `godaddyAffiliateId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `porkbunAffiliateId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `hostingerAffiliateId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `userSettings_userId_unique` (`userId`)
);

  `namecheapApiKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `namecheapUsername` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,

  `godaddyApiSecret` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `porkbunApiKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `porkbunSecretKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `hostingerApiKey` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `onboardingCompleted` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `priceAlertsEnabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `notificationsEnabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `namecheapAffiliateId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `godaddyAffiliateId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `porkbunAffiliateId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `hostingerAffiliateId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `userSettings_userId_unique` (`userId`)
);
